instructions.summary: Set up Dev.to RSS import — no API key needed. One-time 2-minute setup syndicates all 12 guides automatically.
instructions.why: Dev.to supports RSS feed import which auto-creates draft articles from our RSS feed. This bypasses the API key requirement entirely. All 12 guides + 2 new ones will appear as drafts on Dev.to, ready to publish. Dev.to articles create permanent SEO backlinks.
instructions.exact_action:
1. Go to https://dev.to — sign in with GitHub (carloshmiranda)
2. Go to https://dev.to/settings/extensions
3. Scroll to 'Publishing to DEV Community from RSS'
4. Paste this URL: https://verdedesk.vercel.app/feed.xml
5. Click Save
6. Wait 5-10 minutes — articles will appear as drafts in your dashboard
7. Review and publish each draft

No API key needed. The RSS feed contains all 12 guides.
instructions.unblocks: 12 guides syndicated on Dev.to — permanent SEO backlinks + organic discovery
